b'=== AND short-circuit ==='
b'Testing: False and check_true()'
b'Result:' False
b'Testing: True and check_true()'
b'check_true called'
b'Result:' True
b'=== OR short-circuit ==='
b'Testing: True or check_false()'
b'Result:' True
b'Testing: False or check_false()'
b'check_false called'
b'Result:' False
b'=== Chained logical ==='
b'True and False and True:' False
b'True or False or True:' True
b'True and False or True:' True
b'True or False and True:' True
b'=== NOT combinations ==='
b'not True:' False
b'not False:' True
b'not not True:' True
b'not (True and False):' True
b'not (True or False):' False
b'=== Practical examples ==='
b'5 in [0,10]:' True
b'15 in [0,10]:' False
b'5 out of [0,10]:' False
b'15 out of [0,10]:' True
b'(5<10 and 10<15) or (5>15):' True
